description: A practical and stylish choice of bag in lime green from kiara.  Extra roomy and comfortable to carry, the leather effect fabric and stylish buckle will give a sophisticated look to any outfit.Height: 24cmWidth: 37cmDepth: 7cmMade of synthetic leather for durabilityHas one large main zipped compartment with two internal zipped pockets and organiser pocketsOne shoulder strap attached to bag with decorative metal loopsTwo zipped pockets on front, two on sides and one on backChunky metal zip pulls for style and easy of useDecorative buckle at frontCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
